title: candollina haenkeana
intro: Candollina haenkeana, also known as the Candollea, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the Andean region of South America, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Candollina haenkeana can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
